abilities.name: Extended Reach
abilities.text: Enemy models within 2" cannot take attack actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Great Teacher
abilities.text: Non-unique allies within 6" receive a (+) to all duels.

abilities.name: Honorable
abilities.text: Models ignore all (+) and (-) during opposed duels with this model.

abilities.name: Strategist
abilities.text: After an ally within 6" empowers a duel, it gains an Adaptable token.

actions.name: Ancient Yari
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Sp of 7 or greater, this action receives +1 Skl.

triggers.name: Flaming Yari
triggers.text: Enemies within (aura)2" gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

actions.name: Logistics
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. Move the target up to its Sp. The target may remove an Adaptable token to ignore models and terrain while moving.

triggers.name: Will of the Oyabun
triggers.text: Select up to two non-joker cards from the target's discard pile and place them on top of their fate deck, in any order.
